methodology.name: LLM Border Threat Taxonomy
methodology.description: OpenRouter free routing chooses the final country attribution and canonical threat category for each headline.

regional_summary_6h.headline: Azerbaijan‑Armenia bread convoy sparks border tension as Georgia's political clash risks spillover
bullets: Azerbaijan dispatched a convoy of bread through the Armenia border, prompting heightened security alerts in the frontier zone.
Ruling party forces and opposition groups in Georgia clashed over EU pressure, raising the risk of unrest near the Turkish border.
Iran and the United States commenced high‑level talks in Switzerland, with no immediate effect on Turkiye's border security.
regional_summary_6h.watch: Watch for rapid escalation at the Azerbaijan‑Armenia crossing that could affect nearby border sectors.
